blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,682 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
